title: The Curse of a Bloodline
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Shanks, Shamrock, Unknown person #12 as The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.
scene: The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: G'IAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WARAM!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Gun- Powder?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hurry, big sis!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: SANDERSONIA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...by Fisher Tiger!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: There's someone out there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Someone fighting to free us from this hell!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hurry, Koala!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You have to run!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This attack on the Holy Land was carried out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: In the wake of this incident...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...He would go on to become captain of the sun pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Sounds like it was pretty rough...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THE'T SAY! Someone with the government must've left the armor's open for them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, it's up to us to find the culprit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I can't wait to execute them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's someone I want to introduce you to, Harald.

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: His name is shanks.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's Shamrock's younger brother. They were separated a long time ago due to circumstances.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's suffered many hardships in the surface world. If he were to form a deep-sea contract...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I believe he'd make a great asset, on par with Shamrock.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For the time being, however, he's been given the rank of God's steel, just like you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know I said the same thing when I first met Shamrock too, but... I can't shake the feeling that I've met you before...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know what you're talking about. You're just some giant commoner from the surface!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Don't act so familiar with me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was blessed from birth with England blood in my veins!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: have no doubt, I'm going to become a knight of God before you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...Guess I mistook you for someone else.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come on, Shamrock. I wish to deepen my knowledge of the holy land.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I shall apprehand that traitor to claim the credit I deserve. Are there any leads?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It can wait till your wounds are fully healed, shanks...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You cannot fathom the anguish of having the last 24 years of your life wasted!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No wonder the rest of the world seemed so alien to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: God steel devotee (figarland family) SAINT SHANKS

dialogue.speaker: Shamrock
dialogue.text: knight of God (figarland family) SAINT SHAMROCK

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I HATED EVERYTHING DOWN THERE!!

summary: This part advances The Weight of Elbaf’s Bloodline through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
